variants: Keva Klopp was born in Ivycrest Place, a small town known for its artistic community. She currently resides at Sunnybrook Arcade, where she finds inspiration for her creative pursuits. An accomplished inventor, Keva authored the Thundertide Conductor Module, which has gained recognition in her field. Her contributions were honored with the prestigious Dewhaven Award, highlighting her impact on technology. Keva is also an active member of the Desert Glass Walkers, a society that promotes creativity and innovation among its participants.
